Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 9 

81 = Baker Island 
84 = Howland Island 
86 = Jarvis Island 
 89 = Kingman Reef 
95 = Palmyra Atoll 

Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: The state corresponding to the home address is used. When home address is unavailable, the state 
corresponding to the mailing address is used instead. 

Values obtained from https://www.census.gov/library
